changes: Column cloning: template formulas now propagate when writing to new quarters
Wrong-workbook guard: uploading the template instead of the source file now shows a clear error
Label sum lookup: composite labels like "A + B" are now resolved automatically
Added Target Cell column to the review table showing exact cell addresses (e.g. PROJ!CL90)
Smarter shared-formula handling prevents false promotions on standalone formulas
Force-overwrite formula cells in surgical writer
Surgical xlsx writer preserves charts, externals, and printer settings
